role: Root directory for the ArchSpine architectural awareness system, containing the agent entry skill and template artifacts for identity, prompts, rules, and external documentation.
responsibility: Collectively, the components in this directory define the initial entry workflow for AI agents entering a repository, enforce a reminder policy for ArchSpine usage, and provide a set of foundational templates that govern the system's identity, prompt construction, architectural rules, and high-level documentation views, ensuring consistent and structured interaction between agents and the ArchSpine mirror system.

children.role: Agent skill guide for the ArchSpine architectural awareness system
This directory serves as the central repository of template artifacts governing the ArchSpine mirror system's identity, prompt construction, architectural rules, and external documentation views.
